```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2085 creates a more streamlined process for clinic development in California.",
    "AB 2085 eliminates the ability for localities to arbitrarily discriminate based on the care delivered.",
    "AB 2085 expands health care access to California's most vulnerable communities.",
    "AB 2085 requires a standard 60-day timeline for approvals of developments for reproductive rights clinics.",
    "AB 2085 prohibits denials of clinic developments based on standards not in place at the time of application.",
    "Reproductive rights organizations are trying to keep up with demand by expanding their services.",

    "Attacks on sexual and reproductive health care persist in California, despite constitutional protections for abortion."
  ]
```
